title: Punjabi University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Punjabi University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Punjabi University Result 2026 out for 1st, 3rd, 5th and 9th semester BA Hons, MA, B.Com LLB, B.Tech, B.Voc, MBA Distance, PG Diploma and other courses on the official website - results.pupexamination.ac.in on the latest result update. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Punjabi University result.

content.text: Punjabi University Patiala has officially released the Punjabi University Exam Result 2026 for multiple UG, PG, integrated and vocational courses for the September 2024 and November/December 2025 semester examinations. The newly published results include B.A. Honors School Course in Economics Sem I, M.A. Linguistics Sem III, B.Com LLB Sem IX, PG Diploma in Cosmetology Sem I, MBA Distance Education Sem IV, B.Tech Mechanical Engineering Sem V, several B.Voc programmes, MA Sanskrit Sem III (Private), MA Hons in Social Sciences Multi Disciplinary (FYIP) Sem IX, LLB Sem V, BA LLB Sem IX, PGDCA Sem II Re-appear and PG Diploma in Yoga Sem I, among others. Punjabi University Result 2026 has been released online on the official results website - results.pupexamination.ac.in.

Students can check and download their Punjabi University exam results by visiting the PUP results portal, selecting the relevant course and semester result link, and entering their roll number wherever required to view the detailed marks or result status. After downloading the provisional result, candidates should verify their personal details, course, semester and subject-wise marks carefully and contact Punjabi University or their respective college in case of any discrepancy or result-related issues.

Punjabi University has published fresh Punjabi University Results 2026 for several semester examinations conducted in Sep 2024 and Nov/Dec 2025 for UG, PG, law, engineering, vocational and diploma programmes. These results cover a wide range of courses such as BA Hons, MA, B.Com LLB, BA LLB, LLB, B.Tech Mechanical, MBA Distance Education, B.Voc programmes, PG Diploma in Cosmetology, PGDCA and PG Diploma in Yoga, giving students across different disciplines access to their latest semester performance online. Students can access and download their Punjabi University semester result 2026 by visiting results.pupexamination.ac.in, using the quick search or course-wise links and entering their roll number to view and save their provisional marksheet for reference.

sections.heading: Punjabi University Exam Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: Punjabi University has activated the Punjabi University Exam Result 2026 direct links for various UG, PG, law, engineering and vocational semester examinations on its official PUP results portal. Using these course-wise direct links, students can instantly open the result page for BA Hons, MA, B.Com LLB, BA LLB, LLB, B.Tech, B.Voc, MBA Distance and diploma programmes and then check their marks by entering their roll number where prompted. The Punjabi University result direct links provided in the table below help candidates quickly access, view and download their provisional result or marksheet for the ongoing 2025-26 academic session.

links.label: B.A. Honors School Course in Economics Sem - I - SEP-2024
Post Graduate Diploma in Cosmetology Sem-I - DEC-2025
B.Voc (Journalism and Multimedia Technologies) Sem-III - DEC-2025
B.Voc (Journalism and Multimedia Technologies) Sem-I - DEC-2025

M.A. Honours Multi Disciplinary (FYIP) in Performing & Visual Arts Sem-IX - DEC-2025
M.Sc. Honours Multi Disciplinary (FYIP) in Physical and Chemical Sciences Sem-IX - DEC-2025
B.Voc (Journalism and Multimedia Technologies) Sem-V - DEC-2025
Post Graduate Diploma in Yoga Sem-I - DEC-2025

sections.heading: How to Check Punjabi University Exam Result 2026

content.text: Use the following simple steps to check and download your Punjabi University Exam Result 2026 online through the official PUP results portal.

items: Open your browser and go to the official results website of Punjabi University: https://results.pupexamination.ac.in.

On the homepage, look for the "Quick Search Result Here" or the course-wise result list and click on the relevant link, or directly open the result page at https://results.pupexamination.ac.in/t8/results/results.php.

In the list of available results, find your course and semester title such as BA Hons School in Economics Sem I, MA Linguistics Sem III, B.Com LLB Sem IX, B.Tech Mechanical Sem V, B.Voc, MBA Distance, PGDCA or PG Diploma in Yoga.
Click on the specific result name to open the result entry page.
Enter your examination roll number or other required credentials in the given field and click on the Submit button.
Your Punjabi University semester result 2026 will be displayed on the screen, showing your subject-wise marks and result status.
Download the provisional result or marksheet and take a printout for future reference, admissions and documentation.

Carefully verify your name, roll number, course, semester and marks, and contact the Punjabi University examination branch or your college if there are any errors or RL (Result Later) remarks that need clarification.
